{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Manager - Enterprise GTM",
  "description": "MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Senior Manager - Enterprise&nbsp;GTM

Job Identification:&nbsp;6831
Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Reports To: General Manager - Enterprise Marketing
Division: Enterprise Business

Job&nbsp;Description


	Develop a robust go-to-market process to support the successful launch of EB products, services and solutions, monitoring results and making tweaks where necessary to ensure the achievement of revenue expectations
	Lead managers in the development of holistic 360 degrees approach to taking propositions-products and services to the market including but not limited to ATL and BTL, Channel and Support enablement, Regional and trade activations required for demand generation for all EB segments and service portfolios
	Work in close coordination with Segment Managers, Solution development team, Analytics and Business intelligence, Clients Services, Channel Management and relevant functions to develop detailed plans and programs required to achieve set targets for profitability, revenue, value/market share and stir up value preservation for all EB propositions
	Position EB&rsquo;s propositions as the best-in-class for the defined target segment and ensure they are in the front position of trade and relevant channels to increase overall sales.
	Implement strategy for market growth in conjunction with Segment managers, Product Development Managers, Channel managers and other stakeholders.
	Manage all marketing communications, public relations, sponsorships, events and internal communications for EB working closely with the relevant divisions in MTNN as well as Group EBU where necessary.
	Review market and contribute to the development of marketing strategies for MTNN EB, demonstrating an understanding of MTNN direction and business strategies.
	Develop detailed sales and support channels enablement plans in support of approved strategies in respect of EB, organizing and monitoring resources and periodically reporting progress of plans.
	Create messaging that allows the Sales and Support channels to have consistent, effective and engaging conversations with prospects and customers at each stage of the sales/support cycle
	Develop a range of customer testimonials for external/internal use, including written case studies.
	Conduct win/loss interviews and perform ongoing analysis.
	Manage the rollout, adoption and knowledge transfer on best practices on how to leverage key sales tools across the sales cycle
	Manage the content repository of sales collateral
	Measure the level of usage across tools to provide guidance on business impact, areas for improvement, and additional future projects
	Help develop and implement a standard sales on-boarding program.&nbsp;
	Lead the development of a communication media plan to support the product/solution/offering release, as well as its ongoing lifecycle management.
	Lead the creation of enablement content for direct and indirect sales resources, and also for support channels (e.g. playbooks, battle cards, scripts, presentations, training modules and demos).
	Develop a suite of sales enablement tools that spans the sales cycle, enabling the Sales force to drive higher levels of efficiency, effectiveness and overall professionalism.&nbsp;
	Assist in evaluating, tracking and managing the development and performance of team members, to ensure productivity and achievement of business results.
	Identify training and development needs of EB commercial staff to manage skills enhancement programmes for the virtual sales team to ensure enterprise sales targets are fully met.


Requirements
Education:


	First degree in any relevant discipline
	MBA will be an added advantage
	Fluent in English


Experience:


	9 - 17 years of experience which includes:
	At least 4 years of managerial experience in sales or marketing
	At least 3 years of experience in a B2B environment
	Experience in marketing communications
	Experience in sales enablement or learning and development
	Experience in strategy development and implementation will be an added advantage
	Experience in coaching/knowledge transfer role
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-09",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-06",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MTN Nigeria"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Senior Manager - Enterprise GTM Job at MTN Nigeria




        
    

        
        MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Manager - Enterprise GTM

Job Identification: 6831
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Reports To: General Manager - Enterprise Marketing
Division: Enterprise Business

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop a robust go-to-market process to support the successful launch of EB products, services and solutions, monitoring results and making tweaks where necessary to ensure the achievement of revenue expectations
	Lead managers in the development of holistic 360 degrees approach to taking propositions-products and services to the market including but not limited to ATL and BTL, Channel and Support enablement, Regional and trade activations required for demand generation for all EB segments and service portfolios
	Work in close coordination with Segment Managers, Solution development team, Analytics and Business intelligence, Clients Services, Channel Management and relevant functions to develop detailed plans and programs required to achieve set targets for profitability, revenue, value/market share and stir up value preservation for all EB propositions
	Position EB’s propositions as the best-in-class for the defined target segment and ensure they are in the front position of trade and relevant channels to increase overall sales.
	Implement strategy for market growth in conjunction with Segment managers, Product Development Managers, Channel managers and other stakeholders.
	Manage all marketing communications, public relations, sponsorships, events and internal communications for EB working closely with the relevant divisions in MTNN as well as Group EBU where necessary.
	Review market and contribute to the development of marketing strategies for MTNN EB, demonstrating an understanding of MTNN direction and business strategies.
	Develop detailed sales and support channels enablement plans in support of approved strategies in respect of EB, organizing and monitoring resources and periodically reporting progress of plans.
	Create messaging that allows the Sales and Support channels to have consistent, effective and engaging conversations with prospects and customers at each stage of the sales/support cycle
	Develop a range of customer testimonials for external/internal use, including written case studies.
	Conduct win/loss interviews and perform ongoing analysis.
	Manage the rollout, adoption and knowledge transfer on best practices on how to leverage key sales tools across the sales cycle
	Manage the content repository of sales collateral
	Measure the level of usage across tools to provide guidance on business impact, areas for improvement, and additional future projects
	Help develop and implement a standard sales on-boarding program. 
	Lead the development of a communication media plan to support the product/solution/offering release, as well as its ongoing lifecycle management.
	Lead the creation of enablement content for direct and indirect sales resources, and also for support channels (e.g. playbooks, battle cards, scripts, presentations, training modules and demos).
	Develop a suite of sales enablement tools that spans the sales cycle, enabling the Sales force to drive higher levels of efficiency, effectiveness and overall professionalism. 
	Assist in evaluating, tracking and managing the development and performance of team members, to ensure productivity and achievement of business results.
	Identify training and development needs of EB commercial staff to manage skills enhancement programmes for the virtual sales team to ensure enterprise sales targets are fully met.


Requirements
Education:


	First degree in any relevant discipline
	MBA will be an added advantage
	Fluent in English


Experience:


	9 - 17 years of experience which includes:
	At least 4 years of managerial experience in sales or marketing
	At least 3 years of experience in a B2B environment
	Experience in marketing communications
	Experience in sales enablement or learning and development
	Experience in strategy development and implementation will be an added advantage
	Experience in coaching/knowledge transfer role
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female Sales Representative (Onsite)",
  "description": "Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment &amp; Selection, Performance management, Training &amp; Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Sales Representative (Onsite)

Job Location:&nbsp;Elekahia, Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a reliable, energetic, and customer-focused female sales representative to join our team.
	This is a purely in-store sales role (not a field marketing/outdoor role), focused on welcoming customers, assisting them with purchases, managing stock, and maintaining a tidy shop environment.
	The ideal candidate will provide excellent customer service to ensure sales targets are met.


Job Responsibilities


	Welcome and assist customers in the shop to ensure a positive shopping experience.
	Provide product information and recommendations to facilitate sales.
	Process customer payments (cash/POS) and issue receipts accurately.
	Maintain the store&rsquo;s cleanliness, organization, and visual appearance.
	Manage inventory, including restocking shelves and tracking stock levels.
	Prepare daily/weekly sales reports for management.
	Resolve customer complaints professionally.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Education: Minimum of SSCE/WAEC or equivalent.
	Experience: Proven experience in a shop/retail sales role is an added advantage.
	Gender: Female (Female sales rep role).
	Location: Candidates residing in Elekahia, Rumuomasi, or immediate nearby areas are highly preferred.
	Skills: Excellent communication, polite, and strong customer service skills.
	Must be honest, reliable, and punctual.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	Salary:&nbsp;N70,000 per month.
	Performance Increment: Salary is subject to increase based on performance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvs@odixcityconsulting.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.




Note: Only applicants within close proximity (Elekahia/Rumuomasi) will be considered.",

Female Sales Representative (Onsite) Job at Odixcity Consulting




        
    

        
        Odixcity Consulting is an International Hr consulting and procurement firm. With expertise in Recruitment & Selection, Performance management, Training & Development, Compensation and benefits as well as Outsourcing of goods and services for organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Sales Representative (Onsite)

Job Location: Elekahia, Port Harcourt - Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a reliable, energetic, and customer-focused female sales representative to join our team.
	This is a purely in-store sales role (not a field marketing/outdoor role), focused on welcoming customers, assisting them with purchases, managing stock, and maintaining a tidy shop environment.
	The ideal candidate will provide excellent customer service to ensure sales targets are met.


Job Responsibilities


	Welcome and assist customers in the shop to ensure a positive shopping experience.
	Provide product information and recommendations to facilitate sales.
	Process customer payments (cash/POS) and issue receipts accurately.
	Maintain the store’s cleanliness, organization, and visual appearance.
	Manage inventory, including restocking shelves and tracking stock levels.
	Prepare daily/weekly sales reports for management.
	Resolve customer complaints professionally.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Education: Minimum of SSCE/WAEC or equivalent.
	Experience: Proven experience in a shop/retail sales role is an added advantage.
	Gender: Female (Female sales rep role).
	Location: Candidates residing in Elekahia, Rumuomasi, or immediate nearby areas are highly preferred.
	Skills: Excellent communication, polite, and strong customer service skills.
	Must be honest, reliable, and punctual.


Salary & Benefits


	Salary: N70,000 per month.
	Performance Increment: Salary is subject to increase based on performance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.




Note: Only applicants within close proximity (Elekahia/Rumuomasi) will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Talent City is a dynamic human capital firm specializing in talent sourcing, executive search, and strategic recruitment services across diverse industries. We connect high-performing professionals with forward-thinking organizations, helping businesses build agile, future-ready teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Sales &amp; Marketing Executive to drive business growth and expand our client base within the logistics sector.
	The ideal candidate should have 3&ndash;5 years of experience in sales and marketing, with a strong understanding of international logistics services, particularly air freight, and a proven ability to generate leads, close deals, and build lasting client relationships.&nbsp;


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the logistics and freight forwarding sector.
	Promote services including air freight, sea freight, and customs clearance.
	Generate leads, follow up on prospects, and convert them into clients.
	Build and maintain strong client relationships to ensure repeat business.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies.
	Conduct market research and monitor industry trends.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree (B.Sc.) / HND&nbsp;qualification in Business Administration, Marketing, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in sales and marketing within logistics or freight forwarding.
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., logistics, supply chain, or sales/marketing certifications) will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of international logistics operations (air &amp; sea freight).
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-09",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-10",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Talent City"
    
  },

}



Sales & Marketing Executive Job at Talent City




        
    

        
        Talent City is a dynamic human capital firm specializing in talent sourcing, executive search, and strategic recruitment services across diverse industries. We connect high-performing professionals with forward-thinking organizations, helping businesses build agile, future-ready teams.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Executive

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Sales & Marketing Executive to drive business growth and expand our client base within the logistics sector.
	The ideal candidate should have 3–5 years of experience in sales and marketing, with a strong understanding of international logistics services, particularly air freight, and a proven ability to generate leads, close deals, and build lasting client relationships. 


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities within the logistics and freight forwarding sector.
	Promote services including air freight, sea freight, and customs clearance.
	Generate leads, follow up on prospects, and convert them into clients.
	Build and maintain strong client relationships to ensure repeat business.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies.
	Conduct market research and monitor industry trends.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree (B.Sc.) / HND qualification in Business Administration, Marketing, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	3–5 years of experience in sales and marketing within logistics or freight forwarding.
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., logistics, supply chain, or sales/marketing certifications) will be an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of international logistics operations (air & sea freight).
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical & Maintenance Technician",
  "description": "Simba Group which started operations in 1988, is a conglomerate having a Pan-Nigeria presence and business interests in some ofthe most dynamic sectors in the economy. The Group is a dominant player in the transportation, powerand IT-enabled service sectors, which are critical to the sustained growth of the Nigerian Economy. The corporate vision of the Group is to provide innovative and quality products along with excellent after-sales service to our customers. The activities of the Group are guided by strong value systems built around Integrity, Innovation, Openness and Consistency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical &amp; Maintenance Technician

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department:&nbsp;Operations
Reports To: Head of Operations

Job Summary


	The Electrical &amp; Maintenance Technician will be responsible for carrying out electrical installations, troubleshooting, preventive maintenance, and repair of factory machines and equipment to ensure smooth production operations.
	The ideal candidate must have strong technical knowledge of industrial electrical systems, machine maintenance, and fault diagnosis.


Key Responsibilities


	Carry out routine maintenance and repairs on factory machines and equipment.
	Diagnose electrical and mechanical faults and resolve them promptly.
	Install, maintain, and troubleshoot electrical wiring, panels, motors, and control systems.
	Conduct preventive maintenance to minimize machine downtime.
	Monitor machine performance and recommend improvements where necessary.
	Respond quickly to machine breakdowns and production emergencies.
	Ensure all maintenance activities comply with safety standards and company policies.
	Maintain records of repairs, maintenance schedules, and spare parts usage.
	Support installation and setup of new machines and equipment.
	Ensure tools and maintenance equipment are properly handled and stored.
	Liaise with production teams to ensure operational efficiency.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, Technical Certificate, Trade Test, or equivalent qualification in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field.
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in factory machine maintenance and electrical work.
	Strong understanding of industrial electrical systems and machine repair.
	Ability to read electrical diagrams and technical manuals.
	Good troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Knowledge of safety procedures and preventive maintenance practices.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience working in a manufacturing or production environment.
	Knowledge of PLC systems and industrial automation is an added advantage.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Working Conditions:


	Factory/production environment.
	May require shift work or overtime during machine breakdowns or urgent production schedules.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.",

Electrical & Maintenance Technician Job at Simba Group




        
    

        
        Simba Group which started operations in 1988, is a conglomerate having a Pan-Nigeria presence and business interests in some ofthe most dynamic sectors in the economy. The Group is a dominant player in the transportation, powerand IT-enabled service sectors, which are critical to the sustained growth of the Nigerian Economy. The corporate vision of the Group is to provide innovative and quality products along with excellent after-sales service to our customers. The activities of the Group are guided by strong value systems built around Integrity, Innovation, Openness and Consistency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical & Maintenance Technician
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Operations
Reports To: Head of Operations

Job Summary


	The Electrical & Maintenance Technician will be responsible for carrying out electrical installations, troubleshooting, preventive maintenance, and repair of factory machines and equipment to ensure smooth production operations.
	The ideal candidate must have strong technical knowledge of industrial electrical systems, machine maintenance, and fault diagnosis.


Key Responsibilities


	Carry out routine maintenance and repairs on factory machines and equipment.
	Diagnose electrical and mechanical faults and resolve them promptly.
	Install, maintain, and troubleshoot electrical wiring, panels, motors, and control systems.
	Conduct preventive maintenance to minimize machine downtime.
	Monitor machine performance and recommend improvements where necessary.
	Respond quickly to machine breakdowns and production emergencies.
	Ensure all maintenance activities comply with safety standards and company policies.
	Maintain records of repairs, maintenance schedules, and spare parts usage.
	Support installation and setup of new machines and equipment.
	Ensure tools and maintenance equipment are properly handled and stored.
	Liaise with production teams to ensure operational efficiency.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND, Technical Certificate, Trade Test, or equivalent qualification in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field.
	2–5 years of relevant experience in factory machine maintenance and electrical work.
	Strong understanding of industrial electrical systems and machine repair.
	Ability to read electrical diagrams and technical manuals.
	Good troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Knowledge of safety procedures and preventive maintenance practices.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience working in a manufacturing or production environment.
	Knowledge of PLC systems and industrial automation is an added advantage.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Working Conditions:


	Factory/production environment.
	May require shift work or overtime during machine breakdowns or urgent production schedules.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at A27 Global Services Limited




        
    

        
        A27 Global Services Limited is a professional recruitment and career development company. We specialize in connecting job seekers with the right opportunities while equipping them with the tools to succeed in today’s competitive job market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant
Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary

	We are seeking a competent and detail-oriented Restaurant Accountant with hospitality industry experience to manage financial records, monitor daily sales, control expenses, and ensure accurate accounting operations within the restaurant.
	The ideal candidate must understand restaurant accounting processes, inventory control, and financial reporting.


Responsibilities


	Manage daily financial transactions and accounting records
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports
	Monitor cash flow, expenses, and revenue generation
	Reconcile sales reports, POS transactions, and bank statements
	Handle payroll preparation and staff financial records
	Monitor inventory costing and stock reconciliation
	Ensure proper documentation of invoices, payments, and expenses
	Prepare budgets and support management with financial planning
	Maintain compliance with financial policies and procedures
	Assist with tax preparation and statutory financial obligations


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	2–4 years of experience as an Accountant in the hospitality or restaurant industry
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and restaurant financial operations
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Good analytical and organizational skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	Must reside in Ajah or nearby areas.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Benefits:


	Competitive salary
	Opportunity for career growth
	Friendly working environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
